title: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
headline: GTA Online: The Kortz Center Heist
subtitle: Now Available
content:
The Kortz Center, venue for the most dazzling soirees in Los Santos and repository of the world’s most provocatively expensive and expensively provocative artwork. And now, the target of your classiest Heist.

Think you’ve got what it takes to outsmart security and outwit the guards? Then team up with professional hustler Raf De Angelis to steal the Kortz Center’s most valuable exhibits. The museum is open.
